text: First, solve the problem. Then, write the code.
author: John Johnson

text: If you are going through hell, keep going! It ain't a place to stop!
author: Winston Churchill

text: Nothing is more dangerous than active ignorance.
author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe
original: Nichts ist gefährlicher als aktive Dummheit

text: You don't realize what you have until it's gone.
History isn’t the study of the past, but the study of previous presents.
author: E. H. Carr

text: Put your money where your mouth is.
God is dead! God remains dead! And we have killed him!
author: Friedrich Nietzsche
original: Gott ist tot! Gott bleibt tot! Und wir haben ihn getötet!

text: God does not play dice.
author: Albert Einstein

text: Those who do not know the past are condemned to repeat it.
author: George Santayana
original: Wer die Vergangenheit nicht kennt, ist dazu verurteilt, sie zu wiederholen.

text: History is written by the victors.
original: Only the winners write the history

text: The winner takes it all. The loser has to fall.
author: ABBA

text: Become who you are.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche

text: Identity does not arise from what we have, but from what we are not willing to lose.
author: Abbas Khider
original: Identität entsteht nicht aus dem, was wir haben, sondern aus dem, was wir nicht zu verlieren bereit sind.

text: Beware that, when fighting monsters, you yourself do not become a monster.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche
original: Wer mit Ungeheuern kämpft, mag zusehn, dass er nicht dabei zum Ungeheuer wird.

text: To be yourself in a world that is constantly trying to make you something else is the greatest accomplishment.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

text: The computer was born to solve problems that did not exist before.
author: Bill Gates

text: The real danger is not that computers will begin to think like men, but that men will begin to think like computers.
author: Sydney J. Harris

text: What the human being is best at doing is interpreting all new information so that their prior conclusions remain intact.
author: Warren Buffett

text: There is a huge difference between believing you know, and knowing you believe.
A single death is a tragedy; a million deaths is a statistic.
author: Kurt Tucholsky

text: The further a society drifts from the truth, the more it will hate those who speak it.
author: George Orwell

text: A people that forgets its past has no future.
author: Winston Churchill

text: The only thing necessary for the triumph of evil is for good men to do nothing.
author: Edmund Burke

text: Just because something was a certain way once doesn't mean it can't be that way again.
author: Rezo (German YouTuber)
original: Nur weil etwas schonmal so war, kann es doch nochmal so sein

text: I tried so hard and got so far, but in the end, it doesn't even matter.
author: Linkin Park (Chester Bennington)

text: If the majority simply does nothing, a few extremists are enough.
original: Wenn die meisten einfach gar nichts machen, reichen ein paar Spinner aus

text: We are living in a world where technology allows us to communicate instantly, yet isolates us profoundly.
Nothing is more dangerous than a man who has nothing to lose.
author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe

text: An eye for an eye only ends up making the whole world blind.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

text: That's the way it is.
author: Red Dead Redemption 2 (Daniel Lanois)

text: What's the meaning of a scar if we don't learn to heal?
author: Underwater (Niall Horan)

text: Humanity's greatest achievement is once again going to be its greatest demise.
The greatest failure is to never start.
You don’t get to live a bad life and have good things happen to you.
author: Arthur Morgan (Red Dead Redemption 2)

text: Be loyal to what matters. Forget about the rest.
author: Arthur Morgan (Red Dead Redemption 2)

text: Vengeance is a fool’s game.
author: Arthur Morgan (Red Dead Redemption 2)

text: We can’t fight change.
author: Hosea Matthews (Red Dead Redemption 2)

text: The right man in the wrong place can make all the difference in the world.
author: The G-Man (Half-Life 2)

text: You either die a hero, or you live long enough to see yourself become the villain.
author: Harvey Dent (The Dark Knight)

text: This world doesn’t like those who are different… Don’t let anyone tell you who you should be.
author: Carl Manfred (Detroit: Become Human)

text: War is hell? No, war is war and hell is hell. And of the two, war is a lot worse. There are no innocent bystanders in hell. But war is chock-full of them.
author: Hawkeye Pierce (M*A*S*H)

text: History is a set of lies agreed upon.
author: Napoleon Bonaparte

text: We measure not the world by what we see, but by what we choose to understand.
author: Jackstar

text: Since you can't add days to your life, try adding life to your days.
author: Chinese Proverb

text: Humanity is code with bugs we cannot fix.
author: Jackstar

text: The world is full of the ruins of empires who thought they were eternal.
Some people are so poor, the only thing they have is money.
author: Patrick Meagher

text: History is the sum of the things that could have been avoided.
author: Konrad Adenauer
original: Die Geschichte ist die Summe der Dinge, die hätten vermieden werden können.

text: I have never seen God, but I have seen people who have committed murders in his name.
author: Mahatma Gandhi
original: Ich habe Gott nie gesehen, aber ich habe Menschen gesehen, die in seinem Namen Morde begangen haben.

text: The freedom of one person ends where the freedom of another begins.
author: Immanuel Kant
original: Die Freiheit eines Menschen endet dort, wo die Freiheit des anderen beginnt.

text: In the end, it doesn't even matter.
author: Chester Bennington (Linkin Park)

text: If someone is trying to bring you down, it means they are already below you.
author: Ziad K. Abdelnour

text: I only wish I had acquired wisdom at less of a price.
author: Hosea Matthews (Red Dead Redemption 2)

text: When writing the story of your life, don't let anyone else hold the pen.
author: Harley Davidson (Attributed / Brand Slogan)
